Top level heading alpha

Intro paragraph for the top level section. It contains enough words to satisfy the readability minimum content threshold without leaning on filler alone, providing real-looking prose between the headings.

Skipped to level three beta

Body for the skipped-level section. The structure intentionally jumps from h1 to h3 without an intermediate h2, mimicking crawl4ai issue #1964 where the heading hierarchy collapsed.

An additional supporting sentence to keep readability from pruning this subsection out of the extracted article body.
